phase1_critical.why_critical: Already in TipoDte union and has accounting mapping, but CANNOT be created because DteValidatorService has no schema. Tenants need credit notes for returns, cancellations, and price corrections. This is a compliance requirement.
tasks: Create Zod schema for tipo 05 in dte-validator.service.ts
Add buildNotaCredito() to dte-builder.service.ts (must include documentoRelacionado reference to original DTE)
Add tipo '05' normalization branch in normalizeJsonForHacienda()
Add CreateNotaCreditoDto with required referenceDocumentId field
Unit tests for validation, building, normalization
Integration test for DTE creation → accounting reversal entry

phase1_critical.why_critical: Needed for surcharges, interest, and corrections that increase the original amount. Same gap as tipo 05 - defined but not creatable.
tasks: Create Zod schema for tipo 06 in dte-validator.service.ts
Add buildNotaDebito() to dte-builder.service.ts (must include documentoRelacionado)
Add tipo '06' normalization branch in normalizeJsonForHacienda()

phase1_critical.why_critical: Required for purchases from individuals without NIT (agricultural products, small vendors). El Salvador tax law requires this for expense deductibility. Accounting mapping already exists (SUJETO_EXCLUIDO).
tasks: Create Zod schema for tipo 14 (different receptor structure - no NIT required)

phase2_important.why_important: Required for any business exporting goods/services. IVA = 0%. Already referenced in PDF labels and analytics but NOT in TipoDte union - dangerous inconsistency.
phase2_important.current_state: NOT IMPLEMENTED but partially referenced in UI code
tasks: Add '11' to TipoDte type union in packages/shared/src/types/dte.types.ts
Add '11' to DTE_TYPES constant in packages/shared/src/constants.ts
Create Zod schema for tipo 11 (different fields: destinatario instead of receptor, incoterms, etc.)
Add tipo '11' normalization (0% IVA, export-specific fields)
Add EXPORTACION accounting mapping (no IVA line)
Schema migration if needed for export-specific fields

phase2_important.why_important: Needed for withholding tax documentation. In TipoDte union but has NO accounting mapping.
phase2_important.current_state: PARTIAL - in type union and PDF labels, but no validation/builder/normalization/accounting
tasks: Create default mapping rule in default-mappings.data.ts

phase3_nice_to_have.why_nice_to_have: Used for goods transfer between locations. Less common for typical invoicing workflows. No financial impact (no IVA, no sale).
tasks: Accounting: may not need journal entry (no financial transaction)

phase3_nice_to_have.why_nice_to_have: Specialized document for settlement operations. Uncommon use case.
tasks: Full pipeline: schema, builder, normalizer, accounting

phase3_nice_to_have.why_nice_to_have: Only for donations. Very specialized use case. Low demand from typical tenants.

cross_cutting_issues.impact: Will break for tipo 11 (0% IVA), tipo 14 (no IVA), and any future rate changes
cross_cutting_issues.fix: Extract IVA rate from DTE type or catalog tributo. Line 1179-1180 of dte.service.ts

cross_cutting_issues.issue: normalizeJsonForHacienda() only has 2 branches: tipo '03' and 'everything else'
cross_cutting_issues.impact: All non-03 types get generic handling that may not match Hacienda schema requirements
cross_cutting_issues.fix: Add explicit normalization branches for each supported type with type-specific field handling

cross_cutting_issues.issue: Type '11' referenced in code but not in TipoDte type union
cross_cutting_issues.impact: TypeScript won't catch errors. PDF and email will show labels but creation will fail at type level
cross_cutting_issues.fix: Either add '11' to TipoDte or remove all references until implemented

cross_cutting_issues.issue: DteValidatorService only has 2 schemas (01, 03) - all other types return 'Schema not implemented'
cross_cutting_issues.impact: Blocks creation of any DTE type beyond 01 and 03
cross_cutting_issues.fix: Add Zod schemas for each DTE type per Hacienda specification

estimated_total.note: Days are estimated for a single developer. Cross-cutting issues should be addressed in phase 1 as they affect all types.
